case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. EVELYN G LANIER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-31-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
